caption:
If you were born in November & December, this message was written for you...

November & December babies carry an ancient wisdom in their bones.
Your emotional depth is your greatest superpower.
The challenge you keep facing? It's actually your greatest teacher.

May 1 – June 15

Tag your November & December person — do they know this? 👇

Music provided by sonican (https://pixabay.com/users/sonican-38947841/)

#luckymonth #astrology #zodiac #cosmic #novemberdecember

script.subject: November & December
script.hook: If you were born in November & December, this message was written for you...
insights: November & December babies carry an ancient wisdom in their bones.
Your emotional depth is your greatest superpower.
The challenge you keep facing? It's actually your greatest teacher.
2025 is shifting something major in your personal timeline.
You love with your whole heart — and that is both your gift and your wound.
script.cosmic_message: The universe is asking you to stop playing small.
script.cta: Tag your November & December person — do they know this? 👇
